subject: A curved, hooked bladed weapon wreathed in flame, hurtling through a smoky orange-red sky
description: A wicked, curved hooked weapon — a flail or scythe-like blade with a chain or shaft trailing behind — flies through the air engulfed in fire. Embers and sparks streak off its trailing edge. The background is a hazy, smoke-and-flame-choked sky in oranges, reds, and dusky browns, with a low horizon suggesting either sunset or a battlefield burning below. No figures are present; the weapon itself is the entire subject, captured mid-flight as if just released or hurled.
foreground: curved hooked bladed weapon wreathed in fire, trailing chain or shaft, embers streaking off
background: hazy smoke- and flame-filled sky, dusky horizon, particulate embers in the air
